vulnerabilities.description: Potential for information leakage through error messages, especially in case of unforeseen errors during task handling.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Implement error handling to capture and log errors without exposing sensitive details. Use generic error messages for API responses.

vulnerabilities.description: Possible lack of input validation could lead to injection vulnerabilities when scheduling tasks or notifying assignees.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Ensure that all user inputs and parameters passed to MongoDB are properly validated and sanitized using libraries like Joi or Mongoose validation schemas.
